ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., satellite, medical, industrial) */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the image belongs to */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image (e.g., GPS coordinates, timestamp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of metrics */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image for which metrics are collected */,
  "num_of_objects" INTEGER /* Number of objects detected in the image */,
  "war_multiband" REAL /* Weighted average remapping for multiband metrics */,
  "n_cut" REAL /* Normalized cut value for clustering */,
  "rag_merging" REAL /* Region adjacency graph merging value */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for detection */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the detection */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positive detections */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negative detections */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the detection */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the detection */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score combining precision and recall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_metrics_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES image_analysis_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the job was submitted */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the job was completed */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the job belongs to */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for the job */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the job (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated completion time of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_jobs_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES image_analysis_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_jobs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "aspect_ratio" TEXT /* Aspect ratio of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis job related to the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threading) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES image_analysis_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis job the parameter is associated with */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the processing parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the processing parameter (e.g., threshold, iterations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_parameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES image_analysis_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version and changes made */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current one in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message detailing the issue */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., processing, file, system) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES image_analysis_jobs ("job_id")
)
